page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.i5e server family. It is configured with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 6763P-C physical cores operating at a clock speed of 2.9 GHz. Because the threads-per-core ratio is 1.0, hyperthreading is disabled, providing dedicated physical execution resources for each virtual CPU. The instance runs on the KVM hypervisor.

The hardware configuration includes 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. A key feature of this instance is its bundled local storage, which consists of a 3839 GB SSD. For network connectivity, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included in the default configuration.

This server is optimized for workloads requiring high local storage capacity and a high memory-to-CPU ratio. The combination of dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64.0 GB of RAM, and a large 3839 GB local SSD makes it suitable for database hosting, local caching layers, and storage-intensive applications. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.2xlarge is an x86_64 server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6763P-C processor running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with a 2.9 GHz clock speed and a threads-per-core ratio of 1.0, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation. The instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. A defining characteristic of this hardware profile is the inclusion of 3839 GB of bundled local SSD storage, alongside a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. With its high storage capacity and dedicated processing cores, this instance is designed for storage-heavy applications, database hosting, and memory-intensive workloads that require consistent performance without hyperthreading overhead.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i5e.2xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB of RAM, 3839 GB of local SSD storage, and 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor.

tagline: An x86_64 server featuring eight dedicated Intel Xeon cores, sixty-four gigabytes of memory, and a three-terabyte local SSD.
